notes: Fix: Login popups (Google, Microsoft, GitHub, etc.) now auto-close after sign-in and open the destination in the browser — no more being stuck in a tiny popup window. New: Drag tabs to reorder them — drag left/right to move tabs, drag group headers to move entire groups. New: Speaker icon on tabs playing audio. Fix: Faster startup — removed external font request, background loads after first paint. Fix: Mute toggle also hides the audio icon.
